testcase.name: Anomaly 4: Write skew — SI allows it (SSI will prevent in Phase 2)
Anomaly 1: No dirty reads — uncommitted writes are invisible
Anomaly 2: No non-repeatable reads — snapshot is frozen at begin()
Anomaly 5: No lost update — first-committer-wins prevents it
Anomaly 3: No phantom reads — new keys inserted after snapshot are invisible
